keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $717.74 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $754.81 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Bullish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $717.74 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AAPL CALL — enter $15.25–$16.85, target $24.07+, stop $9.63.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.40% and QQQ -0.27%. Composite sentiment +32 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), vix, spy trend. VIX at 13.55 (-2.9%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Leadership came from Financials; Energy lagged. Today's standouts: AAPL +4.01%, COIN +3.54%. Laggards: AMD -3.46%, TSLA -0.43%. Carrying AAPL as the top idea into tomorrow (7.2/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
